LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROVING THE DAMAGE ELEMENT CAUSE OF ACTION AND EVEN IF IT HAD DONE SO, DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES PERTAINING TO THE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY AND GRIEVANCE HEARING IS GRANTED. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-16-2010. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE MATTER SETTLED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-21-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. TONY RUCH, TEL. NO. 554-1291 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY;
ATTY. PAUL NATHAN, TEL. NO. 341-1144 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JOSEPH THOMAS.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROVING THE DAMAGE ELEMENT CAUSE OF ACTION AND EVEN IF IT HAD DONE SO, DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES PERTAINING TO THE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY AND GRIEVANCE HEARING IS GRANTED. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Off Calendar

Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, is present, represented by Florence.
Attorney, Tony Ruch, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jospeh Thomas, is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207 , for settlement discussions.
